referral.pageSubtitle: Invite friends and earn rewards when they join.
referral.shareMessage: Send money to the Philippines for less with SulitSend. Use my code {{code}} or tap: {{link}}
referral.termsBody: Share your code with friends. When someone signs up with it and completes their first transfer through one of our partners, you'll earn a free month of SulitSend Premium once Premium launches. Final terms are still pending legal review and this program may change before it goes live.
